creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Diff for the update is available at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/exim/update-4.72-to-4.73.diff

It works in the vanilla configuration for day and a half.  It passes
the compilability test for knobs
 * WITH_KAV
 * WITH_XCLIENT
 * WITH_SO_1024

It is currently being validated via the Tinderbox.

Wider testing and reporting back any issues is appreciated.
--=20
Eygene Ryabinkin                                        ,,,^..^,,,
